preCommit.command: bash -c "git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM -z --name-only | xargs -0 grep -lE 'sk-ant-(oat|ort)01-|security unlock-keychain -p|CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=sk-' 2>/dev/null && echo '\n❌ BLOCKED: staged files contain secrets (tokens or passwords). Remove them before committing.' && exit 1 || exit 0"
preCommit.description: Block commits containing OAuth tokens or keychain passwords
